problem id: 0e7a6920
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  10000010 -> 01001111
  00001101 -> 11010100
  01001110 -> 00011110
  10111011 -> 11001101
  01111101 -> 01001011
  00010000 -> 01111011
  10101000 -> 10010101
  01100000 -> 11100111
  10110101 -> 00111111

query: 00100011
predicted answer: 00101111
